header.share_dialog_desc: Anyone with this link can view the current status of this claim. The link expires in 7 days.

public.title: Claim Status
public.no_pii_notice: This is a secure, limited view. For full details, please log in.

sla.title: SLA Status
sla.incomplete: Waiting for your information before the SLA starts.

body.member_action_required: We need your information before the response timer can continue. Upload the requested evidence or contact support if you are blocked.
body.active_handling: Your claim is in an active handling stage. The response timer is active and public updates appear here as the team moves the case forward.
body.completed: This claim has a final outcome. Review the timeline for what happened or contact support if you need help with the result.
body.outside_operational_sla: This stage does not have an active operational response timer. The timeline still shows public updates that are safe to share.

next_step.draft: Please submit your claim for review.
next_step.submitted: We have received your claim and will assign it to a case manager shortly.
next_step.submitted_to_airline: We have submitted your claim package to the airline.
next_step.verification: We are verifying the provided documents and evidence.
next_step.evaluation: Our experts are evaluating the damages and liability.
next_step.negotiation: We are negotiating with the insurance company for a fair settlement.
next_step.rejected: The claim could not be processed.
